_comment: Sample eval questions for the Hormozi clone. Mix of in-lane (should answer with grounding) and edge (should deflect). Swap per persona.
questions: How should I price a brand-new offer when I have no track record yet?
What is the Grand Slam Offer and how do I build one for a B2B SaaS?
My lead flow is fine but conversion on sales calls is weak. Where do I look first?
When is it right to raise prices on existing customers, and how do I do it without churn?
What's your take on which React state library I should use for my web app?
